case_title: LILIANA PONTI WALTON VS. LAGUNA PARK LP

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: EVIDENCE FOR COURT TRIAL (TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALTON, LILIANA PONTI
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAGUNA PARK LP
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JULY 16, 2018. APPEARANCES:PLAINTIFF PRESENT VIA COURTCALL, DEFENDANT PRESENT IN PRO PER, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKEN THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JULY 16, 2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBITS DETAINED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,213.20 FILED BY WALTON, LILIANA PONTI AS TO DEFENDANT LAGUNA PARK LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE AND DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALTON, LILIANA PONTI
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY WALTON, LILIANA PONTI LAGUNA PARK LP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALTON, LILIANA PONTI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-29-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAGUNA PARK LP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALTON, LILIANA PONTI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAGUNA PARK LP $836.30 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $836.30, COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF BOUGHT & LEFT SMOKE & CO2 DETECTOR IN UNIT PRIOR TO VACATING. COURT ALSO FINDS PLAINTIFF LEFT ALL KEYS FOB IN UNIT BEFORE VACATING. PLAINTIFF HOWEVER DID NOT PROPERLY NOTIFY DEFENDANTS OF HER FORWARDING ADDRESS. DEFENDANTS ENTITLED TO DEDUCT FOR CLEANING, REST BOARD FEE, BOUNCED CHECKS FEE, AND A HAUL AWAY FEE FOR MIRRORS ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
